tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are low, which may indicate malnutrition or protein loss. LDL cholesterol and triglycerides are elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including liver enzymes and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function, nutritional status, and lipid management.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
